round_contract: {'round_objective': 'Add outer try-catch wrapper to main() function in cli.js to catch all unhandled exceptions', 'current_state_assessment': 'cli.js main() function (lines 37-80) has error handling only around the switch statement, but console.log statements and initialization code are OUTSIDE the try-catch. Previous rounds partially addressed plan validation but the core main() wrapper requirement remains incomplete.', 'product_manager_summary': 'Improve CLI error handling so that any unexpected error during command execution shows a friendly red error message and exits cleanly with code 1, instead of crashing with a cryptic Node.js stack trace. This ensures users get consistent, professional error feedback regardless of where something fails in the command processing pipeline.', 'target_files': ['cli.js'], 'acceptance_checks': ['main() function body is entirely wrapped in a single try block', "Outer catch block outputs 'Fatal Error:' prefix in red color code", 'Outer catch calls process.exit(1)', 'No syntax errors - file parses without errors via node --check', 'Existing console.log header output still executes before the try block'], 'expected_diff': ['FILE: cli.js', 'FUNC: main() (line ~37)', 'CHANGE: Move opening console.log statements inside the try block', 'BEFORE:', '```javascript', 'async function main() {', 'try {', "console.log('='.repeat(50));", "console.log('appMaker - AI 驱动的 APP 开发系统');", "console.log('claude-code 编程 + opencode 毒舌点评');", "console.log('工作目录: ' + executeDir);", "console.log('='.repeat(50));", 'console.log();', 'switch (command) { ...', '} catch (error) {', "console.error('\\x1b[31mFatal Error:\\x1b[0m', error.message);", 'if (process.env.DEBUG) {', 'console.error(error.stack);', '}', 'process.exit(1);', '}', '}', '```', 'AFTER:', '```javascript', 'async function main() {', 'try {', "console.log('='.repeat(50));", "console.log('appMaker - AI 驱动的 APP 开发系统');", "console.log('claude-code 编程 + opencode 毒舌点评');", "console.log('工作目录: ' + executeDir);", "console.log('='.repeat(50));", 'console.log();', 'switch (command) {', "case 'health':", "case '--health':", 'await cmdHealth();', 'break;', '// ... other cases ...', 'default:', 'showHelp();', '}', '} catch (error) {', "console.error('\\x1b[31mFatal Error:\\x1b[0m', error?.message || error);", 'if (process.env.DEBUG) {', 'console.error(error.stack);', '}', 'process.exit(1);', '}', '}', '```', 'NOTE: Only the closing brace } of main() and the catch block are added/changed. All existing case statements, functions (cmdHealth, cmdPlan, etc.), and other code remain unchanged.'], 'risk_level': 'low', 'fallback_if_blocked': 'If the wrapper cannot be added without breaking existing try-catch blocks within switch cases, verify the current error handling covers 95%+ of error scenarios and document the limitation in a comment explaining that errors outside the switch may show raw stack traces.', 'impact_score': 7, 'confidence_score': 9, 'verification_score': 8, 'effort_score': 2, 'verification_first_mode': False}
